message:
feat(db,cli,server): SQLite recovery sidecar consolidation, restore candidate safety, and expanded CLI/server capabilities

Database pool (pool.rs, +254 lines):
- Consolidate hardcoded "-wal"/"-shm" sidecar references into a single
  SQLITE_RECOVERY_SIDECAR_SUFFIXES array (includes "-journal") used
  across all quarantine, restore, and cleanup paths — previously the
  journal sidecar was silently ignored during recovery operations
- New restore_candidate_path() with collision detection: generates
  unique .restoring-{timestamp} paths and checks for sidecar conflicts
  before selecting, preventing accidental clobber of in-progress
  restoration artifacts
- sqlite_candidate_artifact_conflicts() helper checks primary + all
  sidecar paths for existence
- cleanup_sqlite_candidate_artifact() removes primary + all sidecars
- quarantine_corrupt_sidecars_or_restore_primary and
  quarantine_reconstructed_candidate refactored to iterate the sidecar
  array instead of duplicating per-sidecar logic

CLI (lib.rs, +413 lines):
- Major expansion of CLI functionality including improved subcommand
  handling and diagnostic output

Core (legacy.rs, toon.rs, Cargo.toml):
- Legacy compatibility adjustments and toon encoder improvements
- New dependency in core Cargo.toml

Server (startup_checks.rs, +112 lines):
- Expanded startup validation with additional health check paths

DB (forensics.rs, migrate.rs):
- Forensics: expanded diagnostic query capabilities
- Migrate: improved migration error handling

Share (bundle.rs, finalize.rs, snapshot.rs):
- Bundle: additional share bundle construction improvements
- Finalize: expanded post-bundle integrity checks
- Snapshot: minor snapshot capture enhancement

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -18,6 +18,7 @@ regex.workspace = true
 dirs = "6"
 getrandom = "0.2"
 shellexpand = "3"
+shlex = "1"
 sha1.workspace = true
 fs2.workspace = true
 globset.workspace = true
